name: Keep project doctor process health live after startup cache warming

rounds.implementation_report: Fixed startup-warmed diagnostics so cached doctor/provider data stays static while every diagnostics read overlays compact process status from FileProcessStatusService; shared process_status_value now keeps diagnostics and /api/processes?summary=1 semantics aligned, including live runner reachability/counts, pause flags, and terminal filtering. Added deterministic web coverage for warm-before-runners, workflow/git-sync registration, stale/terminal reconciliation, pause flags, and unchanged cached doctor/provider data, plus daemon-backed project doctor CLI coverage without restart. Verification: focused regression 1/1 passed; process-list compatibility regression 1/1 passed; web suite 106/106 passed; CLI surface suite 1/1 passed; full library rerun 455/455 passed; cargo check --all-targets passed; cargo fmt --all -- --check passed; git diff --check passed. One earlier full-library attempt was 454/455 due an unrelated interactive-terminal timing assertion (500 vs 404); that test passed immediately alone and in the clean 455/455 rerun.

diagnostics: No Quality tests or migrated commands are configured; evaluation was a no-op.
